one_line_ask: Prepare every visual asset for the DYNAMIC SOLUTION CLASSES 10ft x 5ft roadside banner — brand-graded student hero, vector subject icons, brand-colour halftone geometry — and export the authored InDesign layout to a print-ready CMYK PDF for large-format flex printing.
brief:
DYNAMIC SOLUTION CLASSES needs a clean, premium, professional roadside banner (10 ft x 5 ft, 2:1) that stays readable from the road and presents the course/contact info without clutter. The brand palette is primary #046CB8 and secondary #02ADEF, headings/key numbers in bold Inter, with subject-hinting icons, a confident-but-minimal photo of students, and understated geometric elements. The freelancer has already authored the layered banner in InDesign with every line of verbatim copy (institute name, tagline "Where Learning Meets Success", the Pre-Foundation / 9th-10th / 11th-12th course list, "ADMISSIONS OPEN", the three phone numbers with 8103332901 most prominent, the "Railway Station Road, Multai" location, and the four feature bullets). That authored layout (.indd) plus a raw, slightly-tilted DSLR photo of students, a flat icon sheet, and the brand-color swatch file are the client inputs.

Your Adobe production job, end to end:
1. Stand up the project folders and load/preview the raw student photo and the icon sheet.
2. Fix the photo geometry: auto-straighten the tilted horizon, then crop to the banner hero band aspect.
3. Correct and grade it to the brand: auto-tone for
